prompt: An original dark-fantasy vanguard unit called Veil Vanguard: a heavily armored shield-bearer in thick plated armor, wrapped in a tattering translucent veil-cloak that trails behind them, bracing a large teal energy shield forward, cel-shaded 2.5D anime/game production art, painterly textures, high readability, full-body, three-quarter hero framing, clear weapon/shield silhouette, braced grounded defensive stance, solid cold teal rim lighting emphasizing bulk and armor plating, isolated on a perfectly uniform solid #FF00FF magenta background, no shadow outside the base, no text, no logos, no watermark, no copyrighted character likeness, original design only.
